A clear description of the bug.

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

Steps to reproduce — ideally a minimal `.ai-review.json` and the command or CI
event that triggered it.

```
# command / CI context
```

## Logs / output

PR/MR content is treated as untrusted by design, and so is anything you paste here.
